description: Updated signal-loss analysis at commit 10ddabf (2026-04-19). Supersedes signal_loss_report.json by correcting 3 false-positive losses caused by using a stale smoke input from 2026-03-03.

corrections_vs_prior_report.prior_verdict: ignore_par_parser (bigram capture silently failed, cause non root-causée)
corrections_vs_prior_report.head_verdict: CAPTURED. 'machine learning' bigram is in BIGRAM_WHITELIST (batch-1 2026-04-18). raw_tokens contains both 'machine learning' and 'apprentissage automatique'. validated_items contains ESCO URI 3a2d5b45-56e4-4f5a-a55a-4a4a65afdc43 (apprentissage automatique). Prior report was wrong because it used the 2026-03-03 smoke snapshot which predates the batch-1 commit.

corrections_vs_prior_report.prior_verdict: ignore_par_parser (SKILL_ALIASES expansion silently missing, cause non vérifiée)
corrections_vs_prior_report.head_verdict: CAPTURED. SKILL_ALIASES['statistics'] = ['statistiques'] (batch-1 2026-04-18). raw_tokens contains both 'statistics' and 'statistiques'. validated_items contains ESCO URI 7ee4c2ea-b349-4bd2-81a3-ec31475d4833 (statistiques). Prior report used stale smoke.

CAPTURED. SKILL_ALIASES['dashboards'] = ['logiciel de visualisation des données', 'techniques de présentation visuelle'] (batch-1 2026-04-18). Both expansions present in raw_tokens. validated_items contains URIs 65e58886... (logiciel de visualisation des données) and 348b74cd... (techniques de présentation visuelle). Prior report used stale smoke. Note: 'KPI' itself still drops (no alias, no ESCO) — the qualifier signal is lost.

losses_still_valid_at_head.cause: 'power bi' NOT in BIGRAM_WHITELIST. Split into 'power' and 'bi'. 'bi' (len=2) survives raw but drops at _has_noise (skill_filter.py:51: len<3 rule). 'power' does not map. UNCHANGED.
'tableau' not in SKILL_ALIASES / not in esco_alias_fr_v0.jsonl. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
No alias. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
No alias. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
Normalization replaces '-' with space. Not in BIGRAM_WHITELIST. Split into 'scikit', 'learn'. Neither has alias or ESCO match. UNCHANGED.
No alias. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
No alias. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
No alias for 'bash' or 'scripting'. map_skill returns None. UNCHANGED.
'kpi' survives raw but has no alias/ESCO match. The 'dashboards' part IS now captured (batch-1) — but 'KPI' qualifier itself is dropped. Partial recovery compared to prior report.
Only rescued by esco_alias_fr_v0.jsonl which maps 'reporting' to 'analyse de données' — not to a reporting-specific ESCO concept. Conflation unchanged.

'project management' IS in BIGRAM_WHITELIST. But SKILL_ALIASES key is 'project_management' (underscore) not 'project management' (space) — so the bigram token does NOT trigger alias expansion. 'gestion de projets par méthode agile' appears only via 'agile' alias. 'gestion de projets' (generic) is NEVER present in raw_tokens. BUG: key/token format mismatch. UNCHANGED from prior report, but now with confirmed root cause.
'churn', 'customer', 'predict' survive as separate tokens. No alias, no ESCO match. Business signal lost. UNCHANGED.
'(advanced)' qualifier dropped by PUNCT_PATTERN + no proficiency-level carry-through. Only 'utiliser un logiciel de tableur' URI ends up in skills_uri. UNCHANGED.
'etl' captures tool-class URI. 'pipelines' drops. Verb sense (built/automated ETL IN PYTHON) lost. UNCHANGED.

category_count_delta_vs_prior.ignore_par_parser: -2 (both Machine learning and Statistics resolved by batch-1 aliases)
category_count_delta_vs_prior.transforme_en_abstraction_trop_large: -0 (KPI dashboards resolved by batch-1; but Project management bigram-vs-alias-key mismatch still valid)
category_count_delta_vs_prior.perte_de_qualificateur: +1 (KPI qualifier part of 'KPI dashboards' is the new entry)
